utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: It was dreadful . I felt terrible about how I acted when you said those wonderful things .

emotion_cause.span: 3_It was dreadful . I felt terrible about how I acted when you said those wonderful things .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: No , no , that ... that , that is all right . Umm , I am just glad you called .

utterances.speaker: Emily
utterances.text: Ross umm , there is something that I have got to tell you , there is ... there is someone else .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Does that mean the same thing in England as it does in America ?
